---
title: "Geraldine Butt"
---

## Geraldine Butt

**Dates:** (b. Winchester 1854)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1874)

### Biography

She was author of fiction 1876-95, some of her publications are with her sister Beatrice May Butt (b. London 1853).  She was probably a Gosling as ‘Staddacombe’ as CMY wrote (May 24th 1875) to Christabel Coleridge supposing so. She married (1878) John Campbell Robertson Glasgow (1844-1913) and was the author of further works as Geraldine Robertson-Glasgow.  In the 1871 census she was living in Staffordshire with Beatrice and several other sisters and their mother Geraldine May Butt (Quebec 1831-1898).  Her father was Lt.-Col. Thomas Bromhead Butt.  She was probably the Geraldine Glasgow who contributed to <i>MP</i> (1897). [LG 1952]

### Letters

- Letter from Jany 6th 1875 [1876]
- Letter from May 24th 1875

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
